subject: fix(ui): anchor burger dropdown to left edge so it stays in viewport
body:
The hamburger button is the leftmost in the header button group.
With right: 0 the dropdown expanded leftward, going off-screen.
Changed to left: 0 so it expands rightward within the viewport.

Tags: ui, bug
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing

Debt: neutral
Epic: dashboard-ux
Semver: patch
